blockedAssertions.blockedBy: WebGPU/Three.js scene does not render in headless Chromium. Inspector data matches live agents but NPC scene population cannot be proven without headed browser.
WebGPU/Three.js scene does not render in headless Chromium. Backend state propagation into the 3D scene cannot be verified without headed browser.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: Browser section with dev bypass context, isolation boundaries, evidence requirements, and Three.js special handling
Added Discovered Session Knowledge: cockpit logs breakpoint (1500px), Kanban drag-and-drop technique, subagent spawning limitation, issue schema fields, WebGPU limitations

executionNotes: Subagent spawning failed with bun-eval parsing errors. All 16 assertions tested directly in the validator session using agent-browser. A test issue was created for drag-and-drop validation and cleaned up naturally as part of the test company's data.
